Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: shoes by function [300213744], shoes (footwear) [300046065], footwear by form [300252212], footwear [300209280], accessories by location on the legs or feet [300211599], worn costume accessories [300209274], costume accessories [300209273], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Shoes designed to be worn for sports.
Schoenen die zijn ontworpen om te dragen bij het sporten.
Schuh, der entwickelt wurde, um beim Sport getragen zu werden.

Source.Source_ID: 2000046682/Random House Dictionary of the English Language (1987)

Term_Source.Page: Term suggested by Valerie Mendes and Avril Hart, V & A Residency 3/93.
